rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'pass/fail determination per item' within the context of safety inspections. However, the evidence provided only confirms the pass/fail status for a single item (lights on a forklift) and does not demonstrate coverage for all required checkpoints or items as specified in the use case. This indicates a gap in the requirement as the evidence does not confirm that all necessary items have been evaluated for pass/fail status.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all required inspection checkpoints (tires, brakes, lights, horn).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed inspection evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide evidence of pass/fail determination for all required inspection checkpoints.
